phases.title: Webhook Infrastructure & Orchestration

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Add `/webhook/github` endpoint, verify signature, filter PR events, track phase completion, and call `harvestFeature`

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/harvest.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Update `harvestFeature` with idempotency guard against duplicate runs

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/server-github.test.ts --grep "Webhook ignores unmerged PRs"` exits 0

tasks.title: Implement src/db/runs.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Implement `finishRun` to finalize SQLite record with merge commit sha and status

tasks.title: Implement src/cli.ts
tasks.description: Modify: No CLI changes needed, keeping within 10 file limit

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/compression.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Fix test stubs and finalize `computeCompression` logic using `CommitCluster`

tasks.title: Implement src/db/compression.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Expose method to insert a new compression record

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 3
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

phases.title: Done, Done! Notification

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/harvest.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Wire `notifyDoneDone` to format and post the summary to the `003-slack` module API

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Ensure no slack notification is dispatched directly from the webhook to satisfy FR-H11

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 4
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/harvest-e2e.test.ts --grep "Done Done notification sent exactly once"` exits 0

phases.title: Post-Ship Issue Tracking

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Add support for GitHub `issues` events opened/closed/labeled and feature association logic

tasks.title: Implement src/db/issues.ts
tasks.description: New: DB access layer for saving/updating issues

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/issues.ts
tasks.description: New: Logic to format and trigger Slack notifications via `003-slack`

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 5
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/server-github.test.ts --grep "Issue to feature association"` exits 0
